---
applyTo: "**/*.{html,css,scss,js,jsx,ts,tsx}"
---

For frontend-related work in this repository:

- Read `README.md`, `llms.txt`, `ROUTES-REGISTRY.md`, and `CLAUDE.md` first.
- Then use `workflow/MAIN.md`, `quality/MAIN.md`, and `security/MAIN.md`.
- Explain UI and UX decisions in simple language.
- Avoid changing unrelated files.
- If user-facing behavior changes, update `HANDOFF.md` and `memory-bank/project-status.md`.
